title: Electronics/Small Appliance Donation Programs - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Volunteering & Donating > Electronics/Small Appliance Donation Programs 19 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Disaster/Emergency Issues GLIDE REVITALIZATION DONATIONS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts small donations of shelf-stable food, pet food, clothing, small appliances, compact furniture, and household goods. Cannot accept large appliances or big furniture. Supports individuals and families impacted by the March 2025 floods in Douglas County. 301 Glide Loop Drive Glide, OR 97443 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-4pm Email (541) 671-0189 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ALBANY HELPING HANDS ALBANY HELPING HANDS THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a store of used and new items including clothing, appliances, household and kitchen items, electronics, books, and linens. Offers vouchers to use at the thrift store for clothing and household goods to anyone in need. Also accepts donations. 705 First Avenue SE Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Thrift Store: Unrestricted Clothing and household goods vouchers: Unrestricted; once every 30 days Hours: Thrift Store: Monday-Saturday 9am-5pm Donations: Monday-Saturday 9am-5pm Email (541) 791-5139 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BEND-REDMOND HABITAT FOR HUMANITY RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Sells donated new and reclaimed building materials, pre-owned furniture and appliances, and a variety of home improvement items. Proceeds from sales support building homes. Accepts donations of building materials, cabinets, doors and windows, flooring, lighting, plumbing, tools, furniture and home decor, appliances, and miscellaneous items. Pickup is available for items that do not fit in a passenger vehicle. 224 NE Thurston Avenue Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store: Monday-Saturday 9am-6pm Donations: Monday-Saturday 9am-5pm, Sunday 11am-3pm Email (541) 548-1406 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CASCADE AIDS PROJECT TOD'S CORNER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides clothing, household goods (including kitchen items), bedding and linens, and other items. Accepts donations of men's clothing, kitchenware, small appliances, bedding and linens, and bathroom supplies. 10202 SE 32nd Avenue Suite 601 Milwaukie, OR 97222 Eligibility: Individuals diagnosed with HIV who have a monthly income below 185% of the Federal Poverty Level Hours: Monday 1pm-4pm, Tuesday/Thursday 2pm-5pm, Wednesday 1pm-3pm Email (503) 349-4699 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE GRESHAM DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of furniture, household items, linens, pots and pans, and small kitchen appliances. No large appliances are accepted. Pickup service available. 464 NE 219th Avenue Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Donation drop-off: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-5pm Pickup service: By appointment Email (503) 235-8786 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE PORTLAND DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of furniture, household items, linens, pots and pans, and small kitchen appliances. No large appliances are accepted. Pickup service available. 3969 NE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Portland, OR 97212 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Donation drop-off: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-5pm Pickup service: By appointment Email (503) 235-8786 1023 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE TIGARD DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of furniture, household items, linens, pots and pans, and small kitchen appliances. No large appliances are accepted. Pickup service available. 9806 SW Tigard Street Tigard, OR 97223 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Donation drop-off: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-5pm Pickup service: By appointment Email (503) 235-8786 1023 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FRIENDS OF LINCOLN COUNTY ANIMALS PICK OF THE LITTER THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Thrift store whose proceeds benefit domesticated animals in Lincoln County, both those housed at the Lincoln County Animal Shelter and those living in community households. Accepts donations of clean and working small kitchen appliances, bedding or linen, toys/games, books clothing, kitchenware and other small household items. 558 NE 1st Street Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store: Friday-Saturday 10am-4pm Donations: Thursday-Saturday 10am-3:30pm Email (541) 574-1861 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FURNISH HOPE DONATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accept donations of new or gently used household items, including kitchen basics such as dishes, glassware, bakeware, small appliances, utensils, pots, pans, home furniture, bedding, and cleaning supplies. 1006 SE 9th Street Bend, OR 97702 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Drop off: Monday-Saturday 9am-11am Pick up: Varies (541) 638-0657 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FURNISH HOPE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a furniture bank of new and gently used household items, including kitchen basics such as dishes, glassware, bake ware, small appliances, utensils, pot, pans, home furniture, bedding, and cleaning supplies. 1006 SE 9th Street Bend, OR 97702 Eligibility: Varies by referral partner, but household must meet at least one of the following: -Individuals transitioning out of homelessness or recovery -People with disabilities or medical challenges -Refugees and people fleeing domestic violence -Foster youth and families, and aged-out foster teenagers -Veteran in the household -Families who have lost a home to a natural disaster Hours: Monday-Saturday 9am-11am (541) 638-0657 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FURNITURE SHARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides used furniture, kitchen, household goods, and food boxes. Accepts furniture, kitchen, and household goods donations. Limited donation pick up is available. 4550 Marion Steet SE Suite C Albany, OR 97322 Eligibility: Low-income households Hours: Furniture Distribution: Monday-Thursday 9am-noon and 1pm-4pm Furniture Drop Off: Friday 9am-4pm Furniture Pickup: Monday-Thursday 9am-noon and 1pm-4pm Email (541) 754-9511 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HUMANE SOCIETY OF CENTRAL OREGON HUMANE SOCIETY OF CENTRAL OREGON THRIFT STORE THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a thrift store that sells donated items, including clothing, furniture, household items, sporting goods, and other items. Net proceeds benefit the animals at the Humane Society of Central Oregon. 61220 S Highway 97 Bend, OR 97702 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store: 7 days per week 10am-6pm Donations: Monday-Saturday 10am-4pm Email (541) 388-3448 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NEXTSTEP RECYCLING AND REUSE STORE NEXTSTEP RECYCLING DONATION CENTER NEXTSTEP RECYCLE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of computer hardware, household appliances, and scrap metal. 245 Jackson Street Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (541) 686-2366 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NW FURNITURE BANK NW FURNITURE BANK VANCOUVER DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of furniture, household items, linens, pots and pans, and small kitchen appliances. No large appliances are accepted. Launder and wash housewares donations prior to pick up. All items must be in good reuseable condition, free of pet hair, rips, and stains. All items will be inspected prior to acceptance. Pickup service available. 13503 SE Mill Plain Boulevard #114 Vancouver, WA 98684 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Drop off: Tuesday-Saturday 9am-4pm Pick up: Appointment required Email (360) 787-7144 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ROGUE VALLEY HUMANE SOCIETY ROGUE VALLEY HUMANE SOCIETY THRIFT STORE THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates a thrift store that sells household goods, books, furniture, toys, clothing, shoes, jewelry, electronics, and various accessories to raise money to benefit animal welfare programs. Donations accepted. 1169 Redwood Avenue Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Friday 9am-4pm, Saturday 9am-2pm Email (541) 955-3367 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SHARING HANDS THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates a thrift store that sells new and used appliances, clothes, electronics, and miscellaneous household goods. Accepts donations in good working condition. 107 W Bishop Way Brownsville, OR 97327 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-4pm Email (541) 466-3003 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SISTERS HABITAT FOR HUMANITY SISTERS HABITAT FOR HUMANITY THRIFT STORE SISTERS HABITAT THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides gently used low cost goods for families in the area that have been donated. Proceeds go toward Habitat for Humanity's affordable homeownership program. Donations and volunteers welcome. 211 E Cascade Avenue Sisters, OR 97759 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store: Monday-Saturday 10am-5pm Donations accepted: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-1pm Email (541) 549-1740 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ST VINCENT DE PAUL LEBANON CONFERENCE FOOD PANTRY AND CLOTHING CLOSET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a food pantry, providing a 3 day supply of food. Also has a rotating supply of clothing, shoes, furniture, appliances, and other household goods supplied by donations. Food, clothing items, and household items accepted for donation. 100 Main Street Lebanon, OR 97355 Eligibility: Must meet federal poverty guidelines Hours: Wednesday 9am-11am and 11:30am-3pm Email (541) 258-5405 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ST VINCENT DE PAUL OF LANE COUNTY RECYCLING AND MANUFACTURING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of electronics (desktop computers, laptops, computer accessories, televisions, monitors, mobile phones, video game systems, etc.), books, clothing, furniture, and electric appliances (refrigerators, ranges, freezers, washers, and dryers). Also provides recycling of mattresses and styrofoam. 2890 Chad Drive Eugene, OR 97408 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 687-5820 Get Directions Visit Website More Details YAMHILL COUNTY GOSPEL RESCUE MISSION YAMHILL COUNTY GOSPEL RESCUE MISSION WOMEN'S FACILITY DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of sweatpants, sweaters, jeans, T-shirts, thermals and underwear, socks, backpacks, batteries, hand warmers, juice, tents, tarps, sleeping bags, bed sheets, and pillowcases. Also accepts financial donations and $25 gift cards for guests. 1340 NE Logan Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 7 days per week 8am-5pm Email (503) 472-9766 Get Directions Visit Website More Details GLIDE REVITALIZATION DONATIONS PROGRAM ALBANY HELPING HANDS ALBANY HELPING HANDS THRIFT STORE BEND-REDMOND HABITAT FOR HUMANITY RESTORE CASCADE AIDS PROJECT TOD'S CORNER COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE DONATIONS COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE DONATIONS COMMUNITY WAREHOUSE DONATIONS FRIENDS OF LINCOLN COUNTY ANIMALS PICK OF THE LITTER THRIFT STORE FURNISH HOPE DONATION CENTER FURNITURE SHARE FURNITURE SHARE HUMANE SOCIETY OF CENTRAL OREGON THRIFT STORE NEXTSTEP RECYCLING AND REUSE STORE NEXTSTEP RECYCLE ROGUE VALLEY HUMANE SOCIETY THRIFT STORE SHARING HANDS THRIFT STORE SISTERS HABITAT FOR HUMANITY SISTERS HABITAT THRIFT STORE ST VINCENT DE PAUL LEBANON CONFERENCE FOOD PANTRY AND CLOTHING CLOSET ST VINCENT DE PAUL OF LANE COUNTY RECYCLING AND MANUFACTURING YAMHILL COUNTY GOSPEL RESCUE MISSION DONATIONS
